name: Wheel Guide
shortDescription: Hot-dip galvanised steel guide preventing vehicles running off dock or ramp edges.
longDescription: A curved, hot-dip galvanised steel guide bolted along a dock or ramp edge to physically deflect a wheel that drifts too close, before it runs off the edge entirely. Powder-coated over galvanising for corrosion resistance in outdoor and washdown environments.

images.alt: Wheel Guide supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
